hero.tagline: An unofficial GitHub Desktop powering your work.
hero.subtitle: A modern, minimalist desktop app where every entry point lives in the sidebar — use every GitHub feature seamlessly, with no constant page reloads or new tabs.

sidebar.title: Unified sidebar
sidebar.description: Every workflow lives in one place — no hunting through tabs.

seamless.title: Seamless flow
seamless.description: Switch between notifications, PRs, and actions without a reload.

fast.title: Fast & native
fast.description: A snappy desktop shell that stays out of your way.

crossPlatform.title: Cross-platform
crossPlatform.description: Runs on macOS, Windows, and Linux.
